title: Will Netflix's takeover of Warner Brothers succeed Before July 2027?

current.rationale_summary: Netflix's Dec-2025 bid for Warner Bros. Discovery collapsed: facing a Paramount Skydance counter-bid and a DOJ second request, WBD signed a definitive merger with Paramount in Feb 2026 and Netflix withdrew, making a completed Netflix takeover before July 2027 near-impossible.
key_drivers: WBD signed definitive deal with Paramount
reference_classes: Original bidder closing after being outbid and signing rival deal <2%
